channel.title: Hormones on Casa de JuJu
channel.description: Recent content in Hormones on Casa de JuJu

item.title: Men are solar, Women are lunar
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Could be an idea to respect your natural cycles. Original post available here Men are solar, women are lunar. Men have a 24 hour testosterone testosterone cycle which peaks in the morning and declines through the day. Women have a 28 day hormonal cycle that changes with the 28 day cycle of the moon. Men are meant to work hard in the morning and around lunch time and relax later in the day.
